subject: DNC Updates [December 22, 2020]...
body:
| | | |
---
| | | **Dear Friends-**
**I hope that you’re taking some well deserved time off. Some of our teams will still be at work over the holidays on the Georgia runoff and supporting this hard working Biden-Harris team as they continue to build an Administration that looks like America.** **Which is why we are still celebrating last week’s great nominee roll out (see below) and we want to thank those of you who are amplifying and lifting them up! ** **As a reminder, there are still Georgia phone banks going tonight, tomorrow and right after the New Year. It’s especially critical to help keep up the momentum even through this holiday break. So please see if you have yet another hour to join a phone bank (see below schedule). Because our best is yet to come if we win Georgia.** **Shout out to Cong. Joaquin Castro, DNC Vice Chair Michael Blake and DNC Latinx Political Director Cynthia Jasso Rotunno who are in tonight’s “Foreign Policy Friends in Ugly Sweaters: Get Out the Vote for Senate Races” phone bank...we love it.** **And finally, congratulations to CA Secretary of State Alex Padilla and CA Assemblywoman Shirley Weber on being selected to fill California’s soon to be vacant U.S. Senate seat and Secretary of State post. Secretary Padilla will be the first Latino in the state’s history to serve in this capacity, and Asm. Weber will be the first African-American to serve as California’s secretary of state. Please see below the full statement from DNC Chair Tom Perez.** **These are hard fought historic times. Happy Holidays to one and all!** **Yours in the Fight,** **Mũthoni ** **In this Update**
* **President-elect Biden’s climate team nominees**
* **Additional members to President-elect Biden’s communications team **
* **DNC on the Appointment of Alex Padilla to the U.S. Senate and Shirley Weber as Secretary of State**
* **Georgia Senate Phone Banks**

**Building Back Better** **President-elect Biden has stayed true to his commitment to select a diverse cabinet that “looks like America.” The most recent nominees, Rep. Deb Haaland, Gov. Jennifer Granholm, and Michael Regan, who comprise key members of his climate team are a reflection of the qualified and talented team he is putting in place. Congresswoman Deb Haaland is a stellar nominee for the Department of the Interior who would serve as the country’s first Native American Cabinet secretary. Two-term Governor Jennifer Granholm of Michigan, has centered her work on creating clean energy jobs. Current Secretary of the North Carolina Department of Environmental Quality, Micahel Regan, has a track record of bringing people together from various sectors to advance environmental justice and seek solutions to environmental and climate challenges.** **And in great news from our DNC family, I would like to extend a special shout out to the DNC’s very own ****[Michael Kikukawa](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=8c41c11aeb&e=d6c5c7d7ec) ****and [Vedant Patel](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=970f4c1fbe&e=d6c5c7d7ec) who will be serving on the Biden-Harris Whte House Communications team. They have worked tirelessly during their time here and will be a wonderful addition to that team!** ** ** **Congresswoman Deb Haaland: Secretary of the Interior** **Congresswoman Deb Haaland currently serves as the Representative for the First District of New Mexico in the House of Representatives — one of the first two Native American women elected to the United States Congress. As a single mom and someone who has lived paycheck to paycheck Haaland knows the struggles many families face. A longtime organizer, Haaland has spent her career advocating for the needs of her community. In Congress, she holds leadership positions including the 116th Congress Freshman Class Representative to the House Democratic Steering and Policy Committee, House Democratic Region VI Whip, and Deputy Whip for the Congressional Progressive Caucus. She is also the Vice Chair of the House Committee on Natural Resources and Vice Chair of the Democratic Women’s Caucus. ** ** ** **Former Governor Jennifer Granholm: Secretary of Energy** **Jennifer Granholm served as Michigan’s 47th governor for two terms, and was the first woman to lead the state in its history. During her tenure, she oversaw the statewide response to the Great Recession, working closely with the Obama-Biden Administration to rescue the U.S. auto industry — a feat widely credited with saving one million American jobs. Granholm’s chief focus as governor was on retooling and electrifying the auto industry to prepare it for durable global leadership and in-state job growth; her efforts to diversify the Michigan economy by sparking a new clean energy sector have served as a state and national model for future economic and job growth.** ** ** **Michael Regan: Environmental Protection Agency Administrator** **Michael Regan currently serves as Secretary of the North Carolina Department of Environmental Quality. Bringing a deep understanding of the interconnectedness of the environment, economy, and public health, Secretary Regan conceptualized and operationalized North Carolina’s Executive Order 80 — a landmark effort to address climate change’s impact and transition the state’s energy economy. Regan led the negotiations that resulted in the cleanup of the Cape Fear River, which had been contaminated with dangerous per- and polyfluoroalkyl substance (PFAS), negotiated and oversaw the largest coal ash cleanup in the United States, and created North Carolina’s first Environmental Justice and Equity Advisory Board to address societal disparities exacerbated by environmental issues during his tenure as Secretary. **
---
|
---
| **Vedant Patel: Assistant Press Secretary** **Vedant Patel served as Regional Communications Director on the Biden-Harris Campaign. During President-elect Biden’s primary campaign, Patel served as the Nevada and Western Primary-States Communications Director. Previously, Patel worked as Communications Director to Congresswoman Pramila Jayapal, Western Regional Press Secretary at the Democratic National Committee, and Communications Director to Congressman Mike Honda. Born in India and raised in California, Patel is a graduate of the University of California-Riverside and the University of Florida. He lives in Washington, DC with his wife.**
---
|
---
| **Michael Kikukawa: Press Assistant** **Michael Kikukawa is the Rapid Response Coordinator for the War Room at the Democratic National Committee. He previously served as Communications Associate and Director of LGBTQ Media for the DNC, and as assistant to DNC Chair Tom Perez, CEO Mary Beth Cahill, and Deputy CEO Sam Cornale. In the immediate run-up to the 2018 midterm elections, Kikukawa was Press Assistant for Finkenauer for Congress. Born in Hawai‘i, Kikukawa is a graduate of Harvard University.** **DNC on the Appointment of Alex Padilla to the U.S. Senate and Shirley Weber as Secretary of State** **DNC Chair Tom Perez released the following statement:** **“Last month, we made history by electing Kamala Harris as vice president, and I’m proud that California will continue to break barriers by making Alex Padilla its first Latino U.S. Senator and Dr. Shirley Weber its first Black secretary of state. In Alex Padilla and Shirley Weber, the people of California have two true public servants. As secretary of state, Alex fought tirelessly to protect the integrity of our elections and expand access to the ballot. And as a U.S. senator, he will be a fearless champion for working families. The son of immigrants, Secretary Padilla has devoted his life to making things better for his fellow Californians – from the small business owners struggling to make ends meet, to the teachers charged with molding the next generation, to the frontline workers during this pandemic who are risking their lives each and every day. Shirley Weber has also spent decades improving her community. As an assemblywoman and a longtime teacher, Dr. Weber has been a forceful advocate for the quality education every child deserves. And as the daughter of sharecroppers who were once denied the right to vote, Dr. Weber is acutely aware of just how important it is to make sure everyone can make their voice heard in our democracy. She is the perfect choice to lead California and the nation in the fight to protect our elections, expand access to the ballot, and end voter suppression. Governor Newsom has made two terrific decisions, and I can’t wait to see all that Secretary Padilla and Dr. Weber accomplish in the months to come.”** **Georgia Phone banks** **DNC Friends and Family Phone Bank**

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Stand up for President Trump in Washington DC on January 6th
body:
| |
---
[ ](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzU4LWU5Y2M5MTI2MmIyYTQwYTE5MmNjZTZhYTk0MjY5MjZm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9zdG9wdGhlc3RlYWwudXMvP21pZD00MzE2OCZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=sC-bLpVdww_2xf6yJPUgTg)
|
---
I know this year has had its challenges for all of us. I know many of you have shown up in Washington, DC more times than you had planned.

[I’m asking you to show up once more](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzU4LWU5Y2M5MTI2MmIyYTQwYTE5MmNjZTZhYTk0MjY5MjZm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9zdG9wdGhlc3RlYWwudXMvcnN2cC5jZm0_bWlkPTQzMTY4JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=pSKEAh1Sb812hpeoSi8Xqg) to stand in support of President Trump on January 6th.
[COUNT ME IN](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzU4LWU5Y2M5MTI2MmIyYTQwYTE5MmNjZTZhYTk0MjY5MjZm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9zdG9wdGhlc3RlYWwudXMvcnN2cC5jZm0_bWlkPTQzMTY4JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=pAef-mbB2DXBnbgeKtDB1A)
_**If you believe the 2020 election was stolen,[now is our time to make our voices heard](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzU4LWU5Y2M5MTI2MmIyYTQwYTE5MmNjZTZhYTk0MjY5MjZm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9zdG9wdGhlc3RlYWwudXMvcnN2cC5jZm0_bWlkPTQzMTY4JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=P94yqdR_QDT9Jo59QyDOwg) and make a public, peaceful display to the Congress as they vote to certify the Electoral College votes on January 6th.**_

Let’s crowd the streets with so many patriots that they can’t ignore us.

President Trump deserves to have his day in court and if the powers that be won’t give him due process, we must show up to send a message that the American people will not stand for this coup.

**Can I count on you to be there?**
[COUNT ME IN](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzU4LWU5Y2M5MTI2MmIyYTQwYTE5MmNjZTZhYTk0MjY5MjZm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9zdG9wdGhlc3RlYWwudXMvcnN2cC5jZm0_bWlkPTQzMTY4JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=MgPltEun3nx3zNmdgoIs2w)
In liberty,

Jenny Beth Martin
[CONTRIBUTE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzU4LWU5Y2M5MTI2MmIyYTQwYTE5MmNjZTZhYTk0MjY5MjZm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvZG9uYXRlLz9taWQ9NDMxNjgmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=SBvpNJ3yz1rWJ1KiGxXrTw)
|
---

name: Greg Stanton
subject: From my family to yours, happy holidays!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress |
body:
>From my family to yours, I want to wish you a happy holiday season!

Though the end-of-year holiday season in 2020 will have to be celebrated differently, I hope you and your family are able to connect virtually and enjoy being together, even if at a (social) distance.

Because of the hard work, contributions, and sacrifices millions of Americans like you made this year, despite constraints caused by the pandemic, there is already reason to be hopeful for 2021. Until then, I wish you and your family a safe, relaxing holiday, and a happy new year.

Happy holidays and season greetings,

-- Greg

------------------------------------------
| Paid for by Stanton for Congress |
------------------------------------------

Stanton for Congress
4340 E Indian School Rd.
Suite 21-518
Phoenix AZ 85018 United States

body:
We have our first special election requested for 2021.

| |
---
Derek ,
As we celebrate the holidays and Christmas later this week, we're also preparing for the **first special election in 2021.**
The Merrimack Town Council met Monday night and requested a special election to fill the seat of late New Hampshire House Speaker Dick Hinch, and we need to do everything in our power to keep this seat Republican.

clean_body: We have our first special election requested for 2021. | | Derek , As we celebrate the holidays and Christmas later this week, we're also preparing for the first special election in 2021. The Merrimack Town Council met Monday night and requested a special election to fill the seat of late New Hampshire House Speaker Dick Hinch, and we need to do everything in our power to keep this seat Republican. Our legislative majority is razor thin and every Republican we elect to the New Hampshire House is going to have a big impact on the policy and work the legislative can achieve. The Bottom Line: Our Republican agenda is on the line. \- Team NHGOP Invest in our Special Election Victory Fund Today www.nh.gop | New Hampshire Republican State Committee 10 Water Street Concord New Hampshire 03301 |

name: Marco Rubio
subject: Years could be ruined in days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
Friend,

This year has been a battle, Friend, and I just want to let you know how important you have been in our fight to protect our conservative values.

This election year has been EXHAUSTING. I feel it, and I'm sure you do too. But we have to keep fighting Friend. We've come so far and accomplished so much, we can't afford to have it all destroyed because we didn't finish the last month strong. That's why I'm coming to you once again Friend, to humbly ask for a donation of ANY AMOUNT to keep up the fight for our country and our conservative values.

As you read this, politicians, celebrities and liberal megadonors are in Georgia pumping _**MILLIONS**_ of dollars in cash infusions to their liberal candidates to flip Georgia and our entire country **BLUE**. It's unlike anything we've ever seen.

We're not relying on celebrities or dark money donors to win these races in Georgia, Friend, we're relying on grassroots supporters like YOU to contribute any amount possible to help our fight against the liberal money machine.

I know you've helped us before, but I'm BEGGING for your help once again. We're losing ground and running out of time. [**Please, whether it 's $5 or $500, every donation helps us fight back against the socialist left and their plan to take over our country.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rCwEuedanWhNlGBZmgZUTAX1RvsLhAAuYGtTrnGBbImjIWFw7jTncv3P4XnvSsdsandtwYskOUSLsF1CMm7DKSJq41-C-Jie367YV933jMHvLtaMfevvr5j8mfLFvFdZAGBFMEd0FnZ3dDe4Mp_HvfEW2ZBUHj_aCtaxeegStswPfDh0rHBqEZDBTuUPo8navP-3-PPwUppNBuxwn5Q6IZtN1xdwOWGtC5TErfaIM7E0gbz9laqU7u-jOBBlbCuupIUkRqyxp0beWhXCsbeU26-b2-SBKH8lUqO8aTaTYEn_urrKIPfIUQdfHb56g2IyhrxE_2EkpMKuPe0enBUxoET7SnaIyWn-UspCvuXlk2pCHkr-ZyJCISgaoUtX2qNr_Ok4b-Y5i7ovJhhLePQFqxIA6t6AN6uehpioIpJEzB_142p6bw4VlIRvS_XQ3MPBHxSEQd_OpTY=&c=UsRbMQPj8iUSFUCRTmLWhzmXRHncKUEPByPRD5QDbkWWeDvnrwnr0w==&ch=U7Xxajsk9tk8sxsl7yUvKxOeXJ2wHx56OrxF9xDNqoTjm-k1ziDB9w==)

[Rush ANY contribution >>>](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rCwEuedanWhNlGBZmgZUTAX1RvsLhAAuYGtTrnGBbImjIWFw7jTncv3P4XnvSsdsandtwYskOUSLsF1CMm7DKSJq41-C-Jie367YV933jMHvLtaMfevvr5j8mfLFvFdZAGBFMEd0FnZ3dDe4Mp_HvfEW2ZBUHj_aCtaxeegStswPfDh0rHBqEZDBTuUPo8navP-3-PPwUppNBuxwn5Q6IZtN1xdwOWGtC5TErfaIM7E0gbz9laqU7u-jOBBlbCuupIUkRqyxp0beWhXCsbeU26-b2-SBKH8lUqO8aTaTYEn_urrKIPfIUQdfHb56g2IyhrxE_2EkpMKuPe0enBUxoET7SnaIyWn-UspCvuXlk2pCHkr-ZyJCISgaoUtX2qNr_Ok4b-Y5i7ovJhhLePQFqxIA6t6AN6uehpioIpJEzB_142p6bw4VlIRvS_XQ3MPBHxSEQd_OpTY=&c=UsRbMQPj8iUSFUCRTmLWhzmXRHncKUEPByPRD5QDbkWWeDvnrwnr0w==&ch=U7Xxajsk9tk8sxsl7yUvKxOeXJ2wHx56OrxF9xDNqoTjm-k1ziDB9w==)**
Friend, we can't slow up before crossing the finish line. We're SO CLOSE to saving our country's future from a socialist demise but we're not there yet. We have one more fight to win and that's Georgia.

Don't allow this years-long fight to be lost in the final days. We have to finish what we started.

I appreciate all that you have done so far -- more than you know. But it's not over. We have to finish just as strong as we started. The only way we can do that is with you.

Thank you again for everything that you've done and for what you continue to do.

\- Senator Marco Rubio

clean_body: Friend, This year has been a battle, Friend, and I just want to let you know how important you have been in our fight to protect our conservative values. This election year has been EXHAUSTING. I feel it, and I'm sure you do too. But we have to keep fighting Friend. We've come so far and accomplished so much, we can't afford to have it all destroyed because we didn't finish the last month strong. That's why I'm coming to you once again Friend, to humbly ask for a donation of ANY AMOUNT to keep up the fight for our country and our conservative values. As you read this, politicians, celebrities and liberal megadonors are in Georgia pumping MILLIONS of dollars in cash infusions to their liberal candidates to flip Georgia and our entire country BLUE. It's unlike anything we've ever seen. We're not relying on celebrities or dark money donors to win these races in Georgia, Friend, we're relying on grassroots supporters like YOU to contribute any amount possible to help our fight against the liberal money machine. I know you've helped us before, but I'm BEGGING for your help once again. We're losing ground and running out of time. == Friend, this is it. It's down to the wire and we're running out of time. If you wait even another day to join the fight, it could be too late. We need you NOW, Friend, will you join us? == == == == == Friend, we can't slow up before crossing the finish line. We're SO CLOSE to saving our country's future from a socialist demise but we're not there yet. We have one more fight to win and that's Georgia. Don't allow this years-long fight to be lost in the final days. We have to finish what we started. I appreciate all that you have done so far -- more than you know. But it's not over. We have to finish just as strong as we started. The only way we can do that is with you. Thank you again for everything that you've done and for what you continue to do. \- Senator Marco Rubio Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate P.O. Friend,

In just a matter of days, I'll be in Washington to be sworn in and I'm ready to get to work. I have an agenda packed full of the issues Californians face every day: _lowering taxes, creating jobs, creating affordable healthcare and lowering prescription drug prices, supporting small businesses, and getting our community the pandemic relief we need._

Because enough is enough. We defeated Pelosi's handpicked candidate and sent a message to National Democrats: socialism has no place in California's 39th district.

_But we 're not in the clear._ We took the Democrats by surprise,_flipping not 1 but 4 seats across California._ Now, they're back with a vengeance and we won't get that same advantage. [**Can I count on your support to defend this seat from the Far Left and the Democrats ' dark money machine?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IfKpy2JXaSbxXF_8ar71rM7YGUd4aUKOtnfoVA-SDYCBZ3cJWd3R-QvAkK-zWLGcpkcggGhrgewT1c8VFejnva3ZkibMY8er37mrpBxfm-FkoUH6u_GqMKlkgrTDQWPHQR4oqXvwR2HDsBnIgEV_CjKwK3I-8zr3dg3o8XikieFiLnwg_uq_jIf_bhsllD6BIVSt_OjgXQh6-lYexsgTcpV-nA_sJo9IvSvRe6Tk-VJV4TF7zJTXI5kT_5a5F9TBe4NLASN-Smed1EKK0Z0aHoWgPMzNDNIaVSk3hJ_ua9OaELaY38Nj77TpDpkOTv5Hca-S5Y0gPsE0aVqNMKDlCEMVGGuCGi7tGQwn5GRA733lHYTM8avrFPkuKwLMGsxvKrePisC_OTarGahly6Ah_QEzJLrxJGe06-5NHu-4Go4=&c=SW1-pKntk2uxTl8IHCzBPt6MUzznQvgv9vs7zf0TvQTKX7HwaoXz5A==&ch=PBZuTBBp5fhYxgw9yfmdwA0DtJMpphQizuqykDWM_bcM5gq6zjvh0g==)

The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. America's more than 30 million small businesses and the nearly 60 million jobs they create are the lifeblood of our economy but, with shutdowns in place across the nation, they are facing a life-or-death situation.

**Right now, small business owners and their employees need our help. Do you have 10 seconds to sign our "Stop the Shutdown" petition? As we mentioned, it'll only take a moment.**

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Here's How We Finally End Walz' Powers
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=january_showdown_ret&n=1)
---
Peter \-- **Are you ready to finally End Walz' Emergency Powers once and for all?** As you know, we were able to get six Democrats to vote YES on Ending Walz' Emergency Powers in December. And FIVE new Republicans take office on January 5th, including our champion Rep-Elect Erik Mortensen. So when they show up in January, we only NEED FOUR Democrats to vote with us! That's right. If we can get four of the six Democrats who already voted the right way, to stay on our side, we can finally pass the Resolution in the Minnesota House and end this madness. Our team has already deployed volunteer phone callers around the state. Those six Democrats are hearing from small business owners and voters in their district as you are reading this message. The pressure is on! We can't take anything for granted at this point. The destruction of our economy and civil liberties is outrageous. Walz' Emergency Powers MUST End! We owe it to Larvita, Jane and the countless small businesses who opened up in defiance of the Governor already. We also owe it to our young adults who are experiencing alarming rates of depression and suicide. And the high school students who are being blocked from participating in sports. What Tyrant Walz is doing to them is unconscionable. Imagine the hundred thousand supporters of Action 4 Liberty went away. There would be nothing stopping Governor Walz' tyranny on the citizens of Minnesota. But because YOU joined the ever-growing list of supporters of Action 4 Liberty, we CAN stop him for good.
## **And then we'll make him pay for the damage he's done.**
I need your help to make sure we leave no stone unturned. Can you make a donation today to help us fully fund our Final Pressure Campaign? | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=january_showdown_ret&n=2 "DONATE NOW") [DONATE NOW](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=january_showdown_ret&n=3)
---
Insiders at the Capitol are telling us that these six Democrats are already starting to waiver. Was their previous vote just a facade?
We have the ability to hold these politicians' feet to the fire. Our program has proven results and we're right at the finish line. This can all be solved in January!
But we risk losing this battle if we don't have the resources needed to get past the finish line. It would be horrible to have to cut back our program now. Failure is just not an option.
With your support, we will put a full court press on these Democrat targets to make sure they STOP Walz' abusive and illegal powers.
**Equip us with the resources for the January showdown so we can End Walz' Emergency Powers once and for all. Please support our effort with a $100 donation. If that's too much, $50 or even $25 can be the difference between success and failure. Let's make this happen!**
## [Yes, I want to Help Fund the January Showdown](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=january_showdown_ret&n=4)
**In Liberty,

**
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
**_P.S. All our work over the past 9 months comes down to the big January showdown. Once the new Legislature takes office, we need 4 of the 6 Democrats who already voted to End Walz' Emergency Powers to stay on board. But Capitol insiders have informed us that they are already starting to waiver. So we must put immense pressure on them to vote with us so we can put the final nail in the coffin of Walz' Emergency Powers._[Please support us with a $100 donation. If that's too much, $25 or $50](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=january_showdown_ret&n=5) _can make all the difference._**
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=january_showdown_ret&n=6).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=january_showdown_ret&n=7).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=january_showdown_ret&n=8), software for leaders.

body:
Help us keep Indiana RED in 2021! Read more >> | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/thankful-470105?e=1acd9bb3d6)

| | [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=5be973a72a&e=1acd9bb3d6)

id:2020-04-23-15:43:59:705t
---
| Hoosier Republican,

We’re closing in on the end of 2020, and I’m proud to say that from the top of the ticket to the bottom, Republicans delivered at the ballot box.

We grew our supermajorities in the state legislature, re-elected Governor Holcomb in record fashion, elected Todd Rokita as our next Attorney General, and won a critical congressional race in our 5th District. Indiana Republicans will soon hold 1,330 of 1,509 county elected offices throughout the state – a staggering 88%!

We got a lot done, but we have to stay vigilant!

**Will you please help us keep our momentum rolling into 2021 by activating your Gold Card Membership in your Indiana Republican Party?** For just $25 for the whole year, you can become one of the key Republicans to keep Indiana RED!
---
| [BECOME A GOLD CARD MEMBER >>](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=f487d5def0&e=1acd9bb3d6 "BECOME A GOLD CARD MEMBER >>")
---
| The Democrats are more fired up than ever to bring a blue wave to our great state, and we need to stop them before they gain any more traction. They aren’t taking their losses in Indiana lightly, and they’re already organizing for the midterms.

**We need to stand STRONG, and show them that we’re not going to rest on our laurels. **

It’s only because of supporters like you that we’ve had so much success ... please help us keep it going by becoming a Gold Card member in your state party today!

Thanks for your help,

Jake Oakman
Indiana Republican Party

name: Team Steel
subject: Fact vs. fiction
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress
body:
Harley Rouda's determined to win back this seat and is preparing to spend millions more to do it. We can't let him defeat us simply because he outspent us. Can you chip in to prove this seat is not for sale?
****

.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nuiNY_aPUGrIMxU3fRU8r7jZODi5RNOBbifRP8ekG7mVk8eKR33jDv5YcJBuYnn5D_0ZrhSDDP4X_4mY8HYNcuyQBnfLQ3TE2htcKw8qxuzV2Ch3MeTGQ4YXjceGP_tJqKwIHKilK7GzW8cEd1eM6y7dohmq4kI-Pc5n57UpITvUnGOX9ujvtC1YA1IJgoJgOnvKbFtfInhncNhRM2x4o5KPaC5Du9Jgd5EAO4EXbSlfcx5dsFBgk1KZsLW_sUbbSPkb7F5bNdH2VNEyd6Tk0ygBYyBZwhxAL2Lp_FlxZbJPhBrwNhCgj7HhjuLCSaqr1tBBIAvnrom8RKSJm8iN9zv7xie8fkM78JQe-F-DTCmHJzMuoJ-UTJ6GPgbauO9Wl8GT667C8poDE7QD0acekA==&c=ydZeJzQSIF-1nQWFHyTooYYSHmW_vgATrY3B-unkKygqrEjsjs5oCg==&ch=19N0KuZK2sgHPLVEnDrXJskWpwgQZMN434WcwblFYNYu7pvQfcECQA==)
Friend, our Far Left opponent -- the one we defeated just a few weeks ago -- is blaming bad polling and a lack of $. _That couldn 't be farther from the truth._

FACT: The Democrats spent $11 million attacking us. _Nancy Pelosi 's PAC alone spent millions distorting Michelle's record and misleading voters._

FACT: The Democrats spent more dark money against us than any other race in the nation.

FACT: The Democrats outspent us 3:1.

The reality is Far-Left Harley Rouda campaigned as a moderate and went back on his word the minute he set foot in Washington. But now he's determined to win back this seat and is preparing to spend millions more to do it.

_**We can 't let him defeat us simply because he outspent us. [Can you chip in to prove this seat is not for sale?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nuiNY_aPUGrIMxU3fRU8r7jZODi5RNOBbifRP8ekG7mVk8eKR33jDmUB9LbfXLV5yBQhOMlUGMYaKpSEId3nj312RDb7BqfzK9kGWKSSsw-PpRsPchIVublDEWljMqINRbTbkP4vpOOEr_be5HMRRaE9psQnSiO475EEOXCRY_FGIaecFjYBqPLgR1kC5dhaEsfJEGayPsj9ut67LCLFGA_bW243n9V54rDw9G0ZRyomEWkPA1UWbp-l6kAyTUU6rMnZm0HT1UhAqMMb7bn5yMlTk0rSAPqIyQM7HbEr69rAIZGfbQzrxGXs5C5qn432gOBPW1nprUbkwbphvwb6CUM-_O9nUa6I50NGuqcsHTXOCM8xXWrOod6mpQOHRmHRV0eO3ZymEK9EMOHNspetUQ==&c=ydZeJzQSIF-1nQWFHyTooYYSHmW_vgATrY3B-unkKygqrEjsjs5oCg==&ch=19N0KuZK2sgHPLVEnDrXJskWpwgQZMN434WcwblFYNYu7pvQfcECQA==)**_

As a proud conservative woman and first-generation American, Michelle is a threat to the Democrats' narrative. But her accent is part of her story and her experience as an immigrant watching her mother's small business be harassed by a broken government agency is the exact reason she ran for Congress.

Michelle's returned $400 million to California taxpayers, pledged to fight against tax increases, and promised to stop any new taxes. But she can't do it alone. The Far Left is already organizing against us.

And with a Republican House Majority at our fingertips, we can't take any chances.

clean_body: Harley Rouda's determined to win back this seat and is preparing to spend millions more to do it. We can't let him defeat us simply because he outspent us. Can you chip in to prove this seat is not for sale? ** . == Friend, our Far Left opponent -- the one we defeated just a few weeks ago -- is blaming bad polling and a lack of $. That couldn 't be farther from the truth. FACT: The Democrats spent $11 million attacking us. Nancy Pelosi 's PAC alone spent millions distorting Michelle's record and misleading voters. FACT: The Democrats spent more dark money against us than any other race in the nation. FACT: The Democrats outspent us 3:1. The reality is Far-Left Harley Rouda campaigned as a moderate and went back on his word the minute he set foot in Washington. But now he's determined to win back this seat and is preparing to spend millions more to do it. We can 't let him defeat us simply because he outspent us. == As a proud conservative woman and first-generation American, Michelle is a threat to the Democrats' narrative. But her accent is part of her story and her experience as an immigrant watching her mother's small business be harassed by a broken government agency is the exact reason she ran for Congress. Michelle's returned $400 million to California taxpayers, pledged to fight against tax increases, and promised to stop any new taxes. But she can't do it alone. The Far Left is already organizing against us. And with a Republican House Majority at our fingertips, we can't take any chances. == | ==** Thank you, Team Steel == Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress P.O Box 472 Surfside, CA 90743== == == == == | | Michelle Steel for Congress | 8907 Warner Ave Suite 220, Huntington Beach, CA 92647 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

body:

| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE WEDNESDAY, DECEMBER 23, 2020 PHOTO RELEASE: AFRICAN AMERICANS FOR KELLY PRESS CONFERENCE
ATLANTA - Today, conservative businesswoman and political outsider Kelly Loeffler joined African American leaders for a press conference in Marietta. During the press conference, Senator Loeffler detailed her [Prosperity Plan](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XXQmxk7SJsEu7AmynjvA4TwyZHzq3C0PXiWIpcCUnnoJo-GW4exCu7fRPSBkXeJYwM-OlkuG4a96F1Z2hr3d0L_IW9nneQIe6ECSLedW9tzqCHfBXhGri3eJmuebmRlyTWOmOOrDZkcxSeCZQFAtNJPevPhunhk_pYfY6gtf5fYTzXvCQsZcvyGjHcEMtQKeV8jNAewAoM1g1EzFQvgo3-q23jKT3beoUjIc3RrSF3fhse-WLwYptfMofNnFf9jJ6k3wKZ1Xf-w=&c=cj915ZzWEjpT_V1GANarfiXT5DmwYB5Pl3qzXEYtHQn1ds2QKm6tdg==&ch=X2PyR8EZbaQBFcMQGYJ51YM4srpAK7D7qIX5El70O8_3Wb4S7ae_JQ==), which will propel minority communities to new heights of success through safe communities, strong family resources, and new access to career and growth opportunities. She also outlined funding she helped secure for HBCUs and minority farmers as well as her support for [school choice](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XXQmxk7SJsEu7AmynjvA4TwyZHzq3C0PXiWIpcCUnnoJo-GW4exCu3QLUgyR9xvRQ1F6o4nEK4IQW38sqKmB6qA3n6EgfzQnJ2_83YYfI_oQf-WpHo7VKXTpxIEMursRoR1nK2r1ZWBlcCsNnx6iJelb1KocqCxpGg9JLtlFg7OOMNUGs5eBYYzxqjeEI7yrnyS4PYUA2zo_dEqxOvLwkeOq0QEt6lWbaosZIHpdE8SmC_Vt8JlIVMlR1dVubx8NcX2dUCocs2tpB_qFBO5Y4dPS9tfS58xwp28yX7DRqfLLwWJOWWcglBKgsABdKqGNw4fqgk5yyay3jGkjPReGlQ==&c=cj915ZzWEjpT_V1GANarfiXT5DmwYB5Pl3qzXEYtHQn1ds2QKm6tdg==&ch=X2PyR8EZbaQBFcMQGYJ51YM4srpAK7D7qIX5El70O8_3Wb4S7ae_JQ==) and Opportunity Zones.

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Will you sign up to call Georgians with me?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE, POWEREDXPEOPLE
body:
Dear

I hope you and your family are healthy and are able to spend some time
together and offline over the holidays.

As you know, Georgia is about to determine the composition of the Senate,
the partisan advantage in Congress and the ability for the incoming Biden
administration to effectively meet the immediate challenges of Covid and
the recession as well as the longer term goals that could make this the
most progressive administration in history.

Given what’s at stake, we want to make sure we’re all doing what we can to
help.

I hope you’ll join me and the rest of the Powered by People team for two
nights next week as we call the Georgia voters who will determine what
kind of future we have as a country. Make plans to call with me on Monday
(12/28) and Wednesday (12/30), both days at 5pm CST.

Upcoming events:
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/pxp-phone-bank-ga-runoff/?source=ema20201223-117553&t=1001&akid=117553%2E444211%2E3-g1lc ]Virtual Phone Bank with Beto for Georgia
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/pxp-phone-bank-ga-runoff/?source=ema20201223-117553&t=1002&akid=117553%2E444211%2E3-g1lc ]Monday, December 28 at 5:00PM CT

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/pxp-phone-bank-ga-runoff/?source=ema20201223-117553&t=1003&akid=117553%2E444211%2E3-g1lc ]Get more info or RSVP »

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/pxp-phone-bank-ga-runoff2/?source=ema20201223-117553&t=1004&akid=117553%2E444211%2E3-g1lc ]Virtual Phone Bank with Beto for Georgia
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/pxp-phone-bank-ga-runoff2/?source=ema20201223-117553&t=1005&akid=117553%2E444211%2E3-g1lc ]Wednesday, December 30 at 5:00PM CT

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/pxp-phone-bank-ga-runoff2/?source=ema20201223-117553&t=1006&akid=117553%2E444211%2E3-g1lc ]Get more info or RSVP »

Let’s make sure that Jon Ossoff, Raphael Warnock and the people of Georgia
know that we’re with them.

Looking forward to seeing you and calling with you soon.

Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1007&akid=117553%2E444211%2E3-g1lc

name: Team Fair Fight
subject: Check voting off your list today!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight PAC, www
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa326/34a064cc/1ac2b17b/7020961/3545546129/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | Friend - We're smack dab in the middle of the busiest time of the year. We know you have a lot on your plate, but don't forget that this holiday season is also election season! **Check voting in the January 5 runoff elections off your list by casting your ballot today.** **If you requested a mail ballot and did not receive it, we strongly encourage you to vote in person.** Early in-person voting is open in most counties through December 30. Find out when and where you can vote early in person at [iwillvote.com](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa326/34a064cc/1ac2b17b/702096e/3545546129/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://iwillvote.com/"), and don't forget to take [an acceptable form of identification](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa326/34a064cc/1ac2b17b/702096f/3545546129/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://sos.ga.gov/index.php/elections/georgia_voter_identification_requirements2") with you when you head to the polls! **Have a mail ballot? It 's time to return it!** Here's how:
* Follow the instructions and complete your ballot right away!
* Don't forget to sign the oath on the outside of the envelope.
* Find the location of a drop box in your county or your county elections office at [iwillvote.com/locate](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa326/34a064cc/1ac2b17b/702096c/3545546129/VEsC/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://iwillvote.com/locate").
* Once you return your mail ballot, go to [georgia.ballottrax.net/voter](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa326/34a064cc/1ac2b17b/702096d/3545546129/VEsD/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://georgia.ballottrax.net/voter/") to make sure your ballot is received.

The perfect gift for your loved ones is a better future for Georgia. So whether your friends' and family's wish lists include affordable healthcare, environmental justice, COVID-19 relief, racial justice, or an economy that works for everyone, you can help make those wishes come true by casting your ballot today! Visit [iwillvote.com](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa326/34a064cc/1ac2b17b/702096e/3545546129/VEsA/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://iwillvote.com/") to find an early voting location in your county. If you have any questions, please call the Voter Protection Hotline at 888-730-5816. Share the hotline with your family and friends and take the number with you if you plan to vote in person. You can also find more information at [peachvote.com](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa326/34a064cc/1ac2b17b/702096a/3545546129/VEsB/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "http://www.peachvote.com"). January 5 will be here before you know it. Don't wait; make your plan to vote right away! \- Team Fair Fight P.S. Your voting experience matters. We are documenting voters' stories to continue our fight for free and fair elections. Share yours [here](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa326/34a064cc/1ac2b17b/702096b/3545546129/VEsO/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSesRsAhJ9dBbyXI-sWwQJ2MiLWM3co9vyXSzCK0aMvvxBVu8g/viewform"). |
---|---|---

Friend,

We’ve reached out multiple times to invite you to enter to WIN a SIGNED Make America Great Again Hat. We’ve even offered YOU the opportunity to enter TWICE, but according to our records, you STILL HAVEN’T taken action.

As one of President Trump’s TOP supporters, we don’t want you to miss out on the opportunity to DOUBLE your chances of WINNING this ICONIC Make America Great Again Hat that he SIGNED for YOU.
